accounts.name: quote_config
docs: QuoteAssetConfig — fee policy for this quote

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee vault PDA (for PIGEON burn — always needed for ATA validation)

accounts.name: incinerator_pigeon_ata
docs: Only needed if token::burn doesn't work (mint authority revoked edge case)

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint — Keypair, initialized externally with mint_authority = bonding_curve PDA

accounts.name: caller
docs: Pays pool creation fee (0.15 SOL) + rent for CPMM accounts.
Also acts as CPMM "creator" (holds tokens temporarily).

accounts.name: spl_token_program
docs: SPL Token program (for LP mint — CPMM uses SPL Token for LP)

instructions.name: migrate_curve
docs: Migrates old BondingCurve accounts (pre-multi-quote) to new layout.
Inserts quote_mint = PIGEON_MINT, shifts all subsequent fields +32 bytes.

errors.name: QuoteNotEnabledForLaunch
errors.msg: Quote asset not enabled for launch

errors.name: QuoteNotEnabledForTrade
errors.msg: Quote asset not enabled for trade

errors.name: InvalidTokenOrder
errors.msg: Token ordering invalid: token_0 must be < token_1

types.name: FeeVault
docs: Fee vault — accumulates PIGEON fees waiting to be burned
